column1: # ZAP baseline scan rule overrides for OneDelivery API (JSON-only backend)

column3: Incomplete or No Cache-control Header Set (API responses; not browser-cached pages)
Timestamp Disclosure (non-sensitive epoch values in API responses)
Strict-Transport-Security Header Not Set (handled at load-balancer/Kong level)
Server Leaks Version Information (Kong upstream header stripping handles this)
Base64 Disclosure (JWT tokens are expected base64 payloads)
